project_type: Songwriting knowledge base - methodology documentation, Kiro IDE configuration, and reference materials
build_system: None - documentation-only repository. No build step.
test_framework: None - no automated tests. Validation is manual review of methodology completeness.
verification_instructions: 1. Verify core/methodology/ files exist and are 400-600 lines each. 2. Verify .kiro/agents/ files are thin (persona + file references). 3. Verify tools/validate-song.py runs with python3. 4. Verify all new files are well-formed markdown/yaml/python.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. No build system needed. Python 3.11 available for tools/validate-song.py.
contribution_requirements: Follow architecture plan in docs/ARCHITECTURE_PLAN.md. Phase 1: fat methodology files in core/methodology/. Phase 2: thin .kiro/ agents. Phase 3: tools + experiments + README updates.
key_patterns: 1. Methodology is currently fragmented across .kiro/sops/, .kiro/agents/, .kiro/skills/, .kiro/steering/, and references/. 2. The #[[file:path]] syntax is used in .kiro/ files to reference other files. 3. References/ contains deep data tables (scoring rubrics, genre tables, voice templates). 4. The critique methodology is the most complex (12 core categories + 5 advanced assessments + Suno optimization + album-context module).
directory_structure: Root: README.md, SONGWRITING_KNOWLEDGE_BASE.md, MUSIC_PRODUCTION_THEORY.md. .kiro/: agents/(4), sops/(8), skills/(5), steering/(4), hooks/. references/: 8 reference docs. songs/: album tracks + experimental. analysis/: critique reports. examples/: 2 album examples. docs/: ARCHITECTURE_PLAN.md.
